codeReview.summary: Reviewed commit a4e8f76 and confirmed the feature requirements are met: Event::TensionCreated now carries optional horizon, EventBuilder::tension_created accepts horizon, Store::create_tension_full emits horizon on TensionCreated, and HorizonChanged behavior/serialization are covered by tests.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The rust-library-worker skill requires explicit manual verification via cargo doc and tests-first workflow evidence, but this handoff marks followedProcedure=true while reporting no interactive checks and no cargo doc execution. Skill expectations vs enforcement appear misaligned.

summary: Pass: horizon event integration is implemented correctly for this feature scope, with no blocking code issues identified.
